name: 2am Mini-App Creation
summary: May 02: Linkage Lab — interactive kinematic linkage sandbox. Drag joints to reshape planar linkages and watch coupler curves trace in real time. 5 presets, adjustable speed, trace toggle, velocity vectors, Grashof classification.
nextStep: Choose a new mini-app concept for May 3; rotate domain and archetype.

latestRun.title: Linkage Lab
latestRun.notes: Interactive kinematic linkage sandbox. Drag joints to reshape planar linkages (crank-rocker, double-crank, Chebyshev lambda, Peaucellier straight-line, crank-slider) and watch coupler curves trace in real time. 5 presets, adjustable speed, trace toggle, velocity vectors, Grashof classification. Dark engineering theme.
latestRun.verification: HTML parse OK, JS syntax OK. Gallery publishing deferred to daytime — published 2026-05-02 09:51 ACST after Simon noticed missing app. Build itself completed at 02:09 but packaging step (gallery copy, index.html update, git push, state.json update) was skipped.

delegation.workerHandled: Concept selection, BUILD-SPEC.md, full HTML/CSS/JS implementation (~90% of code).
delegation.mainHandled: Reviewed BUILD-SPEC.md, verified HTML/JS syntax, but packaging step (gallery copy, git push, state update) was missed until Simon flagged it.

extraRuns.title: Ripple Lab
extraRuns.notes: Interactive wave interference sandbox — tap to drop pebbles, drag to stir, place persistent wave sources, draw reflective walls, and watch interference patterns form in real time. 5 interaction modes, 3 presets (freeform, double slit, circular pool), adjustable speed/frequency/damping, water/sound color modes. Dark scientific responsive UI.
extraRuns.verification: Playwright CLI screenshots captured (mobile 390x844, desktop 1280x800). Pixel sanity check passed: non-blank dark UI (~96-98% dark pixels) with visible wave crests. Static checks passed. Full interactive verification deferred to daytime (overnight policy).

delegation.workerHandled: Full HTML/CSS/JS implementation, wave physics simulation, canvas rendering, responsive layout, mobile touch handling, presets, UI controls (~75%)
delegation.mainHandled: Concept selection, domain research, requirements framing, code review, verification (screenshots), packaging, gallery publishing, state updates (~25%)

extraRuns.title: Globe Projector
extraRuns.notes: Interactive cartography sandbox / projection guessing game. Draggable source globe, 9 projection lenses, simplified continent outlines, graticule, Tissot-style distortion circles, live thumbnails, side-by-side compare mode, and guess-the-projection streak game. Dark scientific responsive UI.
extraRuns.verification: Static checks passed; local HTTP smoke test passed; Playwright CLI screenshot captured; screenshot pixel sanity check confirmed non-blank dark UI; mini_app_pipeline_check.py passed after GitHub Pages refreshed. Full recorded-video loop not completed because only CLI screenshot verification was available in this unattended run.

delegation.workerHandled: Attempted — worker1 timed out before producing files.
delegation.mainHandled: Concept selection, research synthesis, complete HTML/CSS/JS implementation, verification, packaging, state updates, and gallery publishing.

extraRuns.title: Fermentation Comparison Atlas
extraRuns.notes: Interactive side-by-side comparison explorer of 7 fermentation types with animated timelines, temperature gauges, pH arcs, microbe illustrations, byproduct visualisations, and expandable educational cards. Warm cream theme. Single-file HTML/CSS/JS. Responsive.
